title: pilosella kalksburgensis subsp. virenticana
intro: Pilosella kalksburgensis subsp. virenticana, also known as Virentian Hawksbeard, is a rare and lesser-known plant species that belongs to the dandelion family (Asteraceae). This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating skin irritations, wounds, and inflammation, thanks to its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial compounds. The health benefits of Pilosella kalksburgensis subsp. virenticana include its ability to soothe and calm irritated skin, reduce inflammation, and promote wound healing. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures that can be applied topically or taken orally to reap its medicinal benefits.
